name: Emperor Marius IV
title: Emperor of Aurelia
description: A weak ruler clinging to a legacy he didn't earn. His paranoia grows with each season, but the crown still commands respect — for now.

abilities.name: Imperial Mandate
abilities.description: The weight of the throne still means something. Troops fight harder in the Emperor's name.

name: Cassius Varn
title: Lord Commander of the Imperial Guard
description: The real military power behind the throne. Varn is everything Marius isn't — decisive, courageous, and respected by the troops. Some whisper he should wear the crown himself.

abilities.name: Iron Discipline
abilities.description: Troops under Varn's command hold their ground when others would break.

abilities.name: Fortification Expertise
abilities.description: Varn's defensive positions are legendary. Defenders gain additional bonuses.

name: Lord Aldric Valdris
title: Lord of Valdris Hold
description: Every smile hides a dagger. Aldric plays the long game, positioning his house to inherit the empire when — not if — it collapses.

abilities.name: Web of Whispers
abilities.description: Valdris's spy network gives advance warning of attacks and amplifies scheming.

abilities.name: Silver Tongue
abilities.description: Diplomatic overtures are significantly more likely to succeed.

name: Ser Roland the Unyielding
title: Champion of House Valdris
description: A tournament knight who has never lost a duel. Roland fights for glory and gold — Valdris pays well for both. His loyalty is to the coin, but his pride is to the blade.

abilities.name: Challenge
abilities.description: Can challenge enemy champions to single combat before a battle, potentially demoralizing the foe.

name: Lady Elara Thorne
title: Warden of the Eastern March
description: She leads from the front and her soldiers would die for her. Elara is everything the empire should be — just, brave, and dangerously outnumbered.

abilities.name: Rally the Hopeless
abilities.description: When outnumbered, Elara's forces fight harder. The worse the odds, the fiercer the resistance.

name: Brother Caelen
title: Hedge Knight of House Thorne
description: A former monk who took up the sword when goblins burned his monastery. Fights with a terrifying calm, as if violence were just another form of prayer.

abilities.name: Righteous Fury
abilities.description: Against goblin and bandit forces, Caelen fights with divine fervor.

name: Scar
title: Lord of Blackhollow
description: Born a farmer, forged by famine. Scar didn't choose this life — but he's terrifyingly good at it. His followers see him as a liberator. The empire sees a monster.

abilities.name: Guerrilla Tactics
abilities.description: Scar's raiders hit where you don't expect them. Raid success chance increases significantly.

abilities.name: Common Man's Cause
abilities.description: Desperate people flock to Scar's banner. Recruitment is cheaper and yields more troops.

name: Maren "Red" Ashwick
title: Leader of the Red Wolves
description: She keeps her people alive through wit and ruthlessness. Every fight is calculated — Maren doesn't believe in fair ones.

abilities.name: Vanish
abilities.description: When a battle is lost, Maren's forces scatter and regroup. Reduces losses from defeat.

name: Warchief Grak
title: Uniter of the Tribes
description: The first goblin in living memory to unite the tribes under one banner. Grak is not merely brutal — he's strategic. The surface-dwellers are only beginning to understand what that means.

abilities.name: WAAAGH!
abilities.description: Grak's war cry sends his horde into a frenzy. Massive combat bonus on the attack.

abilities.name: Tribal Unity
abilities.description: As long as Grak lives, the tribes hold together. His death would shatter the horde.

name: Skrit the Tunneler
title: Warboss of the Undermines
description: Leads the sappers and tunnel-rats. Skrit's specialty is appearing where nobody expects goblins to be — inside walls, under floors, behind lines.

abilities.name: Undermine
abilities.description: Skrit's sappers weaken fortifications before an assault. Reduces defender's location bonus.

name: Guildmaster Sera Blackwood
title: Master of the Silver Road
description: Money is the only loyalty Sera understands, and she has more of it than anyone. She doesn't fight wars — she funds the right side of them.

abilities.name: War Profiteer
abilities.description: Sera profits from conflict. When battles happen near trade routes, the Guild gains gold.

abilities.name: Buy Loyalty
abilities.description: Gold speaks louder than swords. Diplomatic actions have increased success chance.
